subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Lord of Eternity, Who, through the effulgent rays of the Most Great Name, hath illumined hearts and minds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مالک قدم را که بانوار اسم اعظم افئده و قلوب را
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
